name: vibe-noveling
description: Complete Chinese web novel writing workflow for Claude Code — built with custom Skills and Agents for project initialization, planning, drafting, consistency checks, and publishing.

plugins.name: vibe-noveling
plugins.description: A complete novel creation workflow with 12 integrated skills and 2 built-in agents: project initialization, world and character design discussions, explosive plot branching, same-goal chapter amplification, book-level planning (Save the Cat 15 beats), chapter outlining, multi-style parallel writing, consistency checks, knowledge graph sync, name generation, snapshot management, and progress visualization.
